labels.label: benign
labels.notes: Use browser, file download, SSH, ping, and video playback traces in an authorized environment.

labels.label: arp_spoof
labels.notes: Collect only inside an isolated lab using controlled tools such as arpspoof or bettercap.

labels.label: ddos
labels.notes: Use public datasets for scale and lab replay for demonstration.

labels.label: trojan
labels.notes: Prefer public malicious traffic traces over executing real malware locally.
